title: ONLINE PARENTING CLASSES - 211info
text: ACTIVE PARENTING PUBLISHERS ONLINE PARENTING CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides online parenting classes for ages 0-16, with a certificate of completion. Hardcopy and ebook materials are available and some classes may be eligible as court ordered parenting class requirements. Website Eligibility: Unrestricted. For court ordered parenting class, check with the deciding authority about its requirements before registering for an Active Parenting Online Group. Hours: Monday-Friday 5:30am-2:30pm Email (800) 825-0060 115 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Online classes (800) 825-0060 ext 115 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information or call for assistance FEES: The course fee of $79.95 includes: -Private credentials to access the online interactive program features -24-hour access to online activities and lessons of registered class -Parent's Guide or eBook -Certified Active Parenting Online Leader guidance and direct email communication during the class period -Certificate upon completion of final quiz DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Court Ordered Parenting Programs Parenting Skills Classes If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
